scripts.dev:customer: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix customer/frontend" "npm run dev --prefix customer/backend"
scripts.dev:admin: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix admin/frontend" "npm run dev --prefix admin/backend"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix customer/frontend" "npm run dev --prefix customer/backend" "npm run dev --prefix admin/frontend" "npm run dev --prefix admin/backend"
scripts.install:customer: npm install --prefix customer/frontend && npm install --prefix customer/backend
scripts.install:admin: npm install --prefix admin/frontend && npm install --prefix admin/backend
scripts.install:all: npm run install:customer && npm run install:admin
scripts.build:all: npm run build:customer && npm run build:admin
